creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
2013/3/25 Sergey V. Dyatko <sergey.dyatko@gmail.com>:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/155431; it has been noted by GNATS.
>
> From: "Sergey V. Dyatko" <sergey.dyatko@gmail.com>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, eric.douzet@gmail.com
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: ports/155431: x11-wm/xfce4: The little bugs
> Date: Mon, 25 Mar 2013 14:20:39 +0300
>
>  Hi,
>
>  xfce4.10  for a long time in the ports tree. Can you reproduce that
>  bugs in it ?

Mount device is not bug, Hal was dropped since Xfce 4.8, this feature
requires libudev (it's specific to Linux), so in Thunar it's desable.

Localization works fine, you must configure LANG and LC_CTYPE
variables in your .xinitrc.

>
>  --
>  wbr, tiger
> _______________________________________________
> freebsd-xfce@freebsd.org mailing list
> http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-xfce

-- 
olivier
